title: AI Adoption Readiness
promise: AI adoption readiness diagnostic for use cases, value, data, technology, workflow, people, governance, and measurement.
audience: Entrepreneurs, boards, executive teams, product leaders, family offices, and SMEs
description: Transformation readiness assessment across Use Cases & Value, Data & Technology, People & Workflow, Governance & Measurement. Four-dimensional radar result, balanced index, level label, strongest-dimension archetype, weakest-dimension 30-day action, and separate evidence-confidence checks.
ogDescription: AI adoption readiness diagnostic for use cases, value, data, technology, workflow, people, governance, and measurement.
